internal_control_name: Remote Access: Prohibited Protocols and Commands

mappings.reason: Explicitly prohibits insecure management protocols (e.g., Telnet, HTTP) for remote access to enterprise assets, satisfying the prohibited protocol definition aspect of CFM-03 but not covering prohibited user commands.

Mandates secure network protocols (e.g., SSH, HTTPS) for managing network infrastructure, satisfying the prohibited protocol definition aspect of CFM-03 for network devices but not covering prohibited user commands.
